---
title: "NanoCore Package"
---

## Purpose

NanoCore provides cross-cutting infrastructure: logging, configuration, and UserDefaults wrappers. It has **zero external dependencies** (Foundation only).

## Components

### NanoConfig

A configuration struct with static presets per app in the nano ecosystem:

```swift
public struct NanoConfig: Sendable {
    public let appName: String
    public let bundleId: String
    public let logDirectory: URL
    public let dataCacheDirectory: URL

    public static let nanoMeme = NanoConfig(
        appName: "NanoMeme",
        bundleId: "com.kaosmaps.nanomeme",
        logDirectory: /* ~/Library/Logs/NanoMeme/ */,
        dataCacheDirectory: /* ~/Library/Caches/NanoMeme/ */
    )
}
```

### NanoLog (Log Categories)

Typed log categories using `os.Logger`:

```swift
public enum Log {
    public static let api = Logger(subsystem: bundleId, category: "api")
    public static let image = Logger(subsystem: bundleId, category: "image")
    public static let ui = Logger(subsystem: bundleId, category: "ui")
    public static let storage = Logger(subsystem: bundleId, category: "storage")
    public static let app = Logger(subsystem: bundleId, category: "app")
    public static let keychain = Logger(subsystem: bundleId, category: "keychain")
}
```

### FileLog

A file-based crash logger with 5MB log rotation, installed via `FileLog.shared.installCrashHandlers()`. Catches `SIGABRT`, `SIGBUS`, `SIGSEGV`, and `SIGFPE`.

### AppStorageValue

A property wrapper for type-safe UserDefaults access:

```swift
@AppStorageValue("defaultResolution", defaultValue: "1K")
var defaultResolution: String
```
